name: Halvas Tou Fourno (Baked Halvah)
recipeInstructions: Mix Cream of Wheat with cinnamon and set aside. In a bowl, cream butter until smooth. In another bowl, beat egg yolks with sugar until thick. Gradually add the butter mixture to the egg yolk mixture, beating well. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Alternately fold the egg white mixture into the butter-egg mixture, starting and ending with the butter-egg mixture. Gently fold in the slivered almonds. Pour the batter into a greased baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. Prepare syrup by boiling sugar, water, cinnamon stick, and cloves for about 8 minutes. Remove from heat and discard the spices. Pour the hot syrup over the baked halvah and let cool before serving.
